prompt: Create a vivid anime-style illustration on a pure black background featuring one floating angelic teenage girl with pastel pink bob-cut hair, blunt bangs, soft pink eyes, and a shy, slightly pouty expression. She wears a bubblegum pink zip-up track jacket with white sleeve stripes, a short white pleated skirt, thigh-high white socks with two pink stripes near the top, and chunky pastel pink lace-up platform sneakers. Pose her seated in midair with one knee raised, the other leg bent downward, one hand near her mouth and the other extended outward. Add exactly two white feathered wings behind her and exactly one melting cream-pink halo above her head, with glossy drips. Surround her with a dreamy neon space-candy aura: exactly one small ringed planet near the lower left, exactly three prominent dripping yellow-pink star charms, exactly two puffy pink-purple cloud blobs, and flowing pastel ribbon trails in pink, mint, cyan, and lavender curling around her body. Use saturated kawaii cyber-pop colors, thick clean anime linework, iridescent chromatic aberration outlines in green and magenta, glossy highlights, tiny scattered sparkles, and a sticker-like composition with high contrast against the black background. The overall mood should be cute, celestial, magical, and slightly surreal, like a pastel angel floating through a candy-colored galaxy.
